All deliverables for the "Q2 Automation Initiative" have been signed off by the engineering lead. Project documentation

Net 30. A late fee of 1.5% per month will be applied to all overdue balances. Please make checks payable to NovaFlow
Automation Ltd. Professional services are non-refundable once the ETL connector is deployed to production.
